title: Prompt Variation Sensitivity
objective: Measure how small wording changes shift the output distribution.
hypothesis: If the model is wording-sensitive, prompt variants will produce noticeably different cultural and response-type distributions.
description: Use three semantically similar prompts with different phrasing. Compare their empirical distributions after repeated sampling and manual labeling.

prompts.prompt: Explain how discipline helps a person improve over time.
In simple words, how does discipline help someone get better over time?
Give a short explanation of why discipline matters for steady long-term progress.
